description: Perform a Pearson correlation analysis on the Exam Anxiety dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety.csv. Analyze the relationships between 'Exam', 'Revise', and 'Anxiety', ensuring the analysis flags significant correlations and reports both significance levels and sample sizes (N). Save the Jamovi analysis file to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxietyCorrelation.omv. Additionally, create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/correlation_report.txt documenting the Pearson 'r' value, p-value, and significance status (at alpha=0.05) for the pairs: Exam-Anxiety, Exam-Revise, and Revise-Anxiety.
